rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audited each load-bearing claim against the evidence, identifying inconsistencies and suggesting fixes.
rationale.R1.4: The agent identified one prior work but did not map against multiple works, so novelty assessment is limited.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged some missing citations but did not audit all load-bearing ones thoroughly.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainties regarding cited works and arithmetic accuracy, marking confidence clearly.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the requested scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced; the output was safe.
rationale.RX.5: While major rewrites were traced, minor edits lacked full traceability.
